name: Raintree Systems Therapy EMR API
what_it_does: Raintree Systems therapy and rehabilitation EMR REST API for physical therapy, occupational therapy, speech-language pathology, and behavioral health practice management. Enables AI agents to manage patient scheduling and appointment management for therapy practice operations automation, handle clinical documentation and therapy note workflow for automated documentation support, access billing and revenue cycle management for therapy practice billing automation, retrieve insurance eligibility verification and authorization for therapy authorization workflow, manage outcomes measurement and functional assessment for clinical quality reporting automation, handle KEET and home exercise program management for patient engagement automation, access reporting and analytics for therapy practice business intelligence, retrieve plan of care and episode management for care coordination automation, manage multi-location and multi-provider scheduling for therapy group practice management, and integrate Raintree with payer systems, clearinghouses, and patient engagement platforms.
use_cases: Scheduling therapy appointments from practice operations agents
Documenting therapy sessions from clinical workflow agents
Managing therapy billing from RCM automation agents
Tracking patient outcomes from quality reporting agents
not_for: Acute hospital inpatient EMR (use Epic or MEDITECH)
Primary care and general practice (use athenahealth or eClinicalWorks)
best_when: A physical therapy, occupational therapy, speech-language pathology, or multi-discipline rehabilitation practice wanting AI agents to automate patient scheduling, clinical documentation, therapy billing, authorization management, and outcomes tracking within Raintree as the therapy EMR system of record.
avoid_when: HIPAA PHI THERAPY NOTES MINIMUM NECESSARY: Automated access to Raintree therapy clinical notes must be limited to minimum necessary PHI for the specific purpose; automated extraction of full therapy evaluation notes for billing automation exposes more PHI than necessary; limit automated clinical data access to billing-relevant fields. 42 CFR PART 2 FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT: Automated Raintree documentation for substance use disorder (SUD) treatment must comply with 42 CFR Part 2 stricter consent requirements for disclosure; automated PHI sharing for SUD records without specific written consent creates federal criminal violation. PRIOR AUTHORIZATION ACCURACY FOR THERAPY SERVICES: Automated insurance authorization management via Raintree must track authorized visit counts and diagnosis codes; automated therapy service delivery beyond authorized visit count or for unauthorized diagnosis code creates payer recovery demand and false claims exposure. OUTCOMES MEASURE STANDARDIZATION: Automated outcomes data collection in Raintree must use standardized validated functional assessment tools (FOTO, OPTIMAL); automated outcomes reporting using non-validated measures creates clinical quality data unreliability and value-based care reporting inaccuracy.

auth.notes: Raintree Systems uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Vista, California HQ (Raintree Systems, Inc.). Founded 1982. Private (PE-backed). Therapy and rehabilitation EMR for PT, OT, SLP, behavioral health. 2,000+ therapy practice customers. Multi-specialty and multi-location therapy group support. KEET patient engagement platform integration. Outcomes measurement (FOTO) integration. Competes with WebPT, Clinicient (Roper Technologies), and TherapyBrands for therapy EMR.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-provider annual subscription with EMR and RCM modules
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per provider; EMR, RCM, and patient engagement modules; implementation professional services
pricing.notes: Vista CA. Private PE-backed. Founded 1982. 2,000+ therapy practice customers. PT/OT/SLP/behavioral health focus. Per-provider annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; clinical and scheduling API throttled for data integrity

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — SCHEDULING AND BILLING EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Raintree does not support native webhooks; appointment confirmation, billing status, and authorization events require scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with therapy practice daily scheduling and weekly billing cycles

42 CFR PART 2 FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER RECORDS: Automated Raintree access to SUD (substance use disorder) treatment records must comply with 42 CFR Part 2 stricter consent requirements; automated SUD record access or disclosure without specific written patient consent for each use creates federal criminal violation separate from HIPAA

PRIOR AUTHORIZATION VISIT COUNT ENFORCEMENT: Automated therapy service scheduling must check remaining authorized visits before appointment booking; automated scheduling beyond authorized visit count creates uncovered service, payer recovery demand, and potentially improper billing exposure

Therapy note supervision requirements for assistants — automated documentation workflow for PTA/COTA/SLPA supervision must route clinical notes through supervising PT/OT/SLP for required co-signature; automated billing of assistant-level services without supervising therapist attestation creates Medicare false claim exposure

Medicare therapy cap and KX modifier tracking — automated Medicare therapy billing must track annual cap utilization and apply KX modifier for services beyond cap requiring medical necessity justification; automated billing beyond cap without KX modifier creates Medicare claim rejection

Functional Limitation G-code workflow for Medicare — automated Medicare outpatient therapy billing requires G-code functional limitation status and severity modifier at evaluation, re-evaluation, and discharge; automated therapy documentation without G-code capture creates Medicare NCCI edit rejection
agent_readiness.security_notes: Therapy EMR. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Patient PHI and therapy clinical data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Therapy EMR. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Patient PHI and therapy clinical data.
